On a certain occasion, the exalted one was going

Mahanama, there are these three teachers found existing in the world.
What three?
Here in Mahanama, the teacher preaches full comprehension of the sense desires

Here in again Mahanama, a certain teacher preaches full comprehension of sense desires
and of the objects of sense but not of feelings.

These are the three teachers found existing in the world.
Now these three Mahanama is the conclusion one and the same or is it different.
At these words, barandu the Kalaman said to Mahanama the Sakin.
See it is one and the same Mahanama.
Where at the exalted one said to Mahanama, see it is different Mahanama.
